_note: Repo-owned candidate variants for non-mutating eval-mode decomposition runs (npm run eval:decomposition -- --variant <id>). A variant is an EXPERIMENT identity only: selecting one never changes accepted behavior; accepting a variant as the new baseline is a repo process change. default_variant must stay the no-override accepted baseline. Variant entry contract: role_overrides maps pm|sr_eng|judge to {runtime?, model?} overrides merged over workflows.decomposition.roles at eval time; prompt_overrides maps prompt target_key to {candidate_prompt_version_id}; judge_candidate_prompt_version_id remains the explicit --judge chain override (labeled phoenix_candidate_version in judge output metadata). Unknown keys, roles, target keys, or override fields fail closed.

accepted_baseline.description: Current accepted behavior: config-resolved role runtimes/models and the repo-accepted judge prompt snapshot. No overrides.
